CustomField.description: DateTime stamp marking this approval row as required (per DH no-booleans rule). Populated = the row blocks apply until decided. Null = the row is informational / auto-satisfied. Pattern mirrors the EnabledDateTime__c convention from FIELD_NAMING.md.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set this when this approval row must be decided before applying the toggle. Leave blank for informational rows.
CustomField.label: Required
